summary: Completed testing of business registration image upload features (logo + cover_photo), public upload endpoint, BusinessCard cover_photo display, business profile share button, and payment history page. Backend: 11/12 tests passed. Frontend: All key features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/upload/public accepts valid JPEG image and returns {url: '...'} - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/upload/public accepts PNG images - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/upload/public accepts WebP images - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/upload/public rejects files >5MB with 400 error - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/upload/public rejects non-image files (PDF) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/upload/public works without authentication - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register accepts logo_url field - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register accepts cover_photo field - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses returns cover_photo field in BusinessResponse - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/payments/my-transactions requires authentication (401) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/payments/my-transactions returns list with valid auth - PASSED
Frontend: /business/register step 1 has 2 separate upload areas (Logo + Foto del negocio) - PASSED
Frontend: Logo upload area shows 'Se mostrará en el perfil circular' - PASSED
Frontend: Cover photo upload area shows 'Se mostrará en búsquedas' - PASSED
Frontend: Validation requires at least one image (logo or cover photo) - PASSED
Frontend: BusinessCard on /search uses uploaded images (cover_photo || photos[0] || logo_url) - PASSED
Frontend: Business profile page shows logo as circular avatar (rounded-full class) - PASSED
Frontend: Share button on business profile opens dropdown menu - PASSED
Frontend: Share menu has WhatsApp option - PASSED
Frontend: Share menu has 'Copiar enlace' option - PASSED
Frontend: Copy link shows toast 'Enlace copiado al portapapeles' - PASSED
Frontend: PaymentHistoryPage has correct data-testid attributes - PASSED (code review)
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/upload/public correctly validates file size (5MB limit) and file types (jpg, jpeg, png, webp, jfif)
BusinessCreate model includes logo_url and cover_photo fields (server.py lines 305-306)
BusinessResponse model includes cover_photo field (server.py line 340)
BusinessCard.jsx correctly uses cover_photo || photos[0] || logo_url fallback chain (line 34)
BusinessProfilePage.jsx shows logo with rounded-full class for circular display (line 687)
ShareButton component has WhatsApp and Copy link options with correct data-testid attributes
PaymentHistoryPage.jsx has all required data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested new business registration image upload features: 1) POST /api/upload/public endpoint for public image uploads (no auth, 5MB limit), 2) BusinessCreate accepts logo_url and cover_photo, 3) BusinessResponse includes cover_photo, 4) Frontend registration form has 2 upload areas (Logo circular, Foto del negocio rectangular), 5) BusinessCard uses cover_photo as primary image, 6) Business profile shows logo as circular avatar, 7) Share button with WhatsApp + Copy link works. PaymentHistoryPage verified via code review - has correct data-testid attributes.

public_upload_endpoint.accepts: JPEG, PNG, WebP images up to 5MB

business_registration_images.logo_url: Accepted in BusinessCreate, shown in circular profile avatar
business_registration_images.cover_photo: Accepted in BusinessCreate, shown as main image in search cards
business_registration_images.validation: At least one image (logo or cover_photo) required in step 1

business_card_image_priority.order: cover_photo || photos[0] || logo_url || fallback unsplash image
